message:
fix(ui): reset started flag if watcher.Start() fails in BackgroundWorker

If watcher.Start() failed, the started flag remained true, causing:
1. Subsequent Start() calls to return nil (appearing to succeed)
2. Stop() to wait 2 seconds on a channel that never closes

Now properly resets started=false on failure so caller can retry
and Stop() won't block unnecessarily.
